metadata.title: Turning a Tight Corner for a Swift Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught two opponents off guard with precise aim and quick reflexes. Watch how positioning and timing make all the difference here.
What’s your favorite clutch moment in VALORANT?
